title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.2
paragraphs: Darius BUFF: Decimate base damage 40/80/120/160->50/90/130/170, Noxian Guillotine 100/200/300->125/250/375.
Riven BUFF: Broken Wings cooldown 13s->12s, Blade of the Exile bonus AD 20%->25%.
Garen NERF: Base health 650->630, Perseverance adjusted, Decisive Strike cooldown/duration modified, Courage damage reduction 80%->70%.
Maokai NERF: Base health 660->630, magic resistance growth 2.5->2, Bramble Smash damage and health ratio reduced.

Kalista CHANGE: Improved Oathsworn channel indicator visibility, fixed bugs with Elder Immolation triggering and stealth interactions, enhanced Rend cooldown reset window and execute health indicator.
Lillia CHANGE: Bugfix for Dream-Laden Bough heal functionality.
Vi CHANGE: Denting Blows stack bugfix after Relentless Force.
New item: Eclipse — physical damage scaling (2900g) with shield generation.
New item: Psychic Projector — support/tank (3100g) converting bonus health to AP.
New item: Sundered Sky — AD/health hybrid (3000g) with critical strike passive.
Blade of the Ruined King BUFF: Physical vamp 10%->12%.
Mercury's Treads NERF: Magic resistance scaling reduced to 7-12% from flat 12%.
Plated Steelcaps NERF: Armor scaling reduced to 7-10% from flat 10%.
Changes to: Amaranth's Twinguard, Dawnshroud, Harmonic Echo, Horizon Focus, Infinity Edge, Infinity Orb, Rabadon's Deathcap, Riftmaker, Sterak's Gage, Youmuu's Ghostblade.
